data.title: Fix: recipe-registry-schema scope property missing cross-file in examples
data.description: The scope property description in recipe-registry-schema.json lists examples (single-file, multi-file, cross-package, function, project) but the actual registry entry uses 'cross-file', which is not in the examples. Either add an enum constraint with the canonical vocabulary including 'cross-file', or update the description examples to include 'cross-file'. File: recipes/schemas/recipe-registry-schema.json
